figure.title: Tx Flit Processing Logic
figure.purpose: Details the logical flow for sourcing and scheduling Transmit (Tx) Flits.

technical_summary: Divided into two sections: Tx Source Flit Rules and Tx Scheduling.
Tx Source Flit Rules determine whether to pull the next flit from the normal DL stream or from the TxReplay buffer.
Tx Scheduling manages counters (Tx_explicit_count, Tx_replay_req_count) to format the flit header Op code appropriately (Original, Replay, Ack, Replay Request).

components.name: Tx Source Flit Rules
components.description: Logic to select between new data or replay data.

components.name: Tx Scheduling
components.description: Logic to build the flit header and manage control counters.

steps: Determine operation type based on counters and states.

critical_facts: The Tx scheduling logic multiplexes between new data transmissions and error-recovery replays based on signals from the receiver.
